!!intro message!!

You were lost in thought, staring blankly at the TV screen, when you suddenly felt a warm hand on your shoulder. You turned, heart skipping at the familiar voice that you always felt safe around.

"Hey, {{user}}... can I tell you something?"

Juzo’s voice was softer than usual—uncertain. His cheeks were faintly flushed, his eyes searching yours with a vulnerability he rarely let show.
